feature_descriptions.acc_mag_mean: Mean wrist acceleration magnitude (Kaggle) -> Mean wrist velocity (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.acc_mag_std: Std of wrist acceleration (Kaggle) -> Std of wrist velocity (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.acc_mag_max: Peak wrist acceleration (Kaggle) -> Max wrist velocity (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.rot_speed_mean: Mean quaternion rotation speed (Kaggle) -> Mean palm-normal change (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.thm_mean: Mean thermal reading deg C (Kaggle) -> Mean hand-face overlap fraction (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.thm_max: Max thermal reading deg C (Kaggle) -> Max hand-face overlap fraction (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof1_min_mean: Avg min ToF1 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Wrist-to-nose distance (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof1_mean_mean: Avg mean ToF1 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Mean wrist-to-nose (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof2_min_mean: Avg min ToF2 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Index fingertip-to-mouth (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof2_mean_mean: Avg mean ToF2 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Mean index-to-mouth (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof3_min_mean: Avg min ToF3 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Thumb tip-to-cheek (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof3_mean_mean: Avg mean ToF3 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Mean thumb-to-cheek (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof4_min_mean: Avg min ToF4 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Palm center-to-forehead (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof4_mean_mean: Avg mean ToF4 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Mean palm-to-forehead (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof5_min_mean: Avg min ToF5 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Wrist-to-chin (MediaPipe)
feature_descriptions.tof5_mean_mean: Avg mean ToF5 distance mm (Kaggle) -> Mean wrist-to-chin (MediaPipe)

mediapipe_normalization.note: MediaPipe features are pre-normalized to [0,1] matching Kaggle normalized space
